description: Use this API to return the auxiliary signal model name associated with a 2-terminal dc line for the specified auxiliary signal index. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, cval = dc2auxmnam(name, isgndx)

error_codes.description: dc line not in network but auxiliary signal model in model tables; ‘CVAL’ returned.
dc line not in network and auxiliary signal model not in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
No model in model tables for the given auxiliary signal index; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
